step.title: Functions App ZipDeploy. Run from package.
WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE is set to 1. Writing zip to SitePackagesPath
Copying zip to SitePackages /home/data/SitePackages/20260617203342.zip from request body
Error occurred
step.text: Exception copying zip file: The process cannot access the file '/home/data/SitePackages/20260617203342.zip' because it is being used by another process.: The process cannot access the file '/home/data/SitePackages/20260617203342.zip' because it is being used by another process.
